title: Caçador Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Caçador, with a Z-Score of -3.66. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing unusually low temperatures, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with no signs of relief in the near future. 
 The high humidity and low wind speed are exacerbating the effects of the cold temperatures.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions immediately.
